backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point with no implemented functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the calendar redesign feature for DashboardPage, linking it to test ID REQ-15 and the affected file with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short summaries describing each file's purpose and key implementation details across the AnantJap app.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base file defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, card, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the AnantJap PWA, mounting the React app into a root div and loading the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing page routing, god selection state, and layout with a LeftSidebar, Header, Footer, and context providers for language, devotee, and theme.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: Empty file — the bottom navigation component has no content, likely replaced by LeftSidebar.
frontend/src/components/FirstLaunchWarni: Displays a dismissible alert warning users that jap data is stored locally and will be lost if the app is deleted, auto-hiding after 8 seconds on first launch.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component rendering navigation links to Terms, Privacy, Copyright, and Feedback pages alongside a caffeine.ai attribution with a heart icon.
frontend/src/components/GodCard.tsx: Card component displaying a deity's image, name, mantra, and jap/mala counts loaded from localStorage, with click-to-select and optional remove functionality.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header showing the AnantJap brand name and a language selector dropdown supporting Sanskrit, English, Hindi, and Gujarati.
frontend/src/components/LeftSidebar.tsx: Renders a fixed vertical navigation sidebar with icon/image nav items (Home, JapCount, BhajanMarg, Dashboard, Settings), an app logo, and an optional god image slot at the bottom, using tooltips for labels.
frontend/src/contexts/DevoteeContext.tsx: Provides a React context for managing a list of devotees and the currently selected devotee, persisting state to localStorage.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: Provides a React context for app-wide language selection (Sanskrit, English, Hindi, Gujarati) with a translation lookup function `t`, persisting the chosen language.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status through a React context and provider.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Minimal placeholder hook that returns an empty object, indicating all data is handled via local browser storage with no backend queries needed.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global Tailwind CSS styles and a comprehensive set of CSS custom properties for the AnantJap brand palette (terracotta/cream tones) in both light and dark modes, plus base typography settings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/BhajanMargPage.tsx: Displays a list of default and custom bhajans (devotional songs) with lyrics, allowing users to add up to 5 custom bhajans and remove non-default ones, with persistence via localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/CopyrightPage.tsx: Static page displaying copyright information for AnantJap, covering intellectual property, spiritual content, user-generated content, restrictions, and attribution.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Dashboard page showing jap (mantra chanting) statistics with a custom spiritual calendar, bar charts for daily/monthly counts, and per-god breakdowns using data stored in localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/FeedbackPage.tsx: Feedback form page that collects name, optional email, and message from users, simulating submission with a toast notification (no real backend integration).
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page displaying default and custom deity cards, allowing users to add/remove custom gods and devotees, with god selection triggering navigation to the jap counting page.
frontend/src/pages/JapCountPage.tsx: Jap counting page for a selected deity that tracks mantra repetitions and mala counts via tap or swipe gestures, persisting daily history and totals to localStorage per devotee and god.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPage.tsx: Renders a static Privacy Policy page explaining that AnantJap stores all data locally, collects no personal information, and outlines data security, deletion, and contact details.
frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.tsx: Settings page allowing users to toggle theme (light/dark/system), choose jap input method (tap/swipe), and export, import, or delete all local app data.
frontend/src/pages/TermsPage.tsx: Renders a static Terms & Conditions page covering usage license, local data storage policy, disclaimers, limitations, and spiritual content guidelines.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom fonts (Cinzel, Lato), OKLCH-based color tokens including AnantJap brand colors (terracotta, dark-brown, cream), border radius, box shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state metadata (version 19) tracking the app summary, known bugs (swipe gesture, image card, header logo, calendar timezone offset), and a list of completed feature implementations with their requirement IDs.
